prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年青海省理科（2025年为物理类，归入理科组）最低位次依次为4167→4564→9529→4694→5120。2023年出现异常断档（9529名），2024年迅速回弹至4694 名，2025年进一步后移至5120名，近两年累计后移约426名，呈缓慢后移趋势；2025年基准位次约5120名；该校在青海省理科组招生计划：2021年50人、2022年5 1人、2023年51人、2024年53人、2025年52人；2026年计划53人（依据2026年招生计划文件），较2025年小幅扩招1人，扩幅约1.9%，竞争略有加剧，位次数字有增大压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第80名（2021年82名→2025年79名→2026年80名），排名近年稳定在80名上下，属中上水平理工 类院校；2023年该校因副校长实名举报校长材料造假事件受到社会关注，评价偏负面；2025年声誉仍偏负面，热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人报考；2026年 声誉继续偏负面，涉及学生学术不端事件。抖音综合热度排名第77位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量不高。整体声誉偏负面可能对报考热度有一定抑制作用；第五轮学科评估中，管理科学与工程获评A等级，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；机械工程、仪器科学、电气工程等工科实力较强，与招生专业中的电气工程及其自动化、机械设计 制造及其自动化、仪器类等高度关联，对相关专业报考有正向吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年社会热度持 续偏高（高热推荐/推荐），与该校优势工科方向吻合；土木建筑、生化环材等专业热度明显偏低。青海省2025年物理类考生约30457人，2026年总考生约48000人（按近年物理类 占比约63.9%估算，物理类约30672人），考生规模略有增加，竞争略加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次缓慢后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（1人）、考生规模略有增加、声誉偏负面等因素，在2025年基准位次5120名基础上，预计202 6年竞争略有加剧，位次数字小幅增大。预测最低位次约5209名，区间4709–5709名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for Qinghai Province Science (2025 as Physics Category, included in Science group) were 4167→4564→9529→4694→5120. An abnormal gap occurred in 2023 (9529th), quickly rebounded to 4694th in 2024, and further shifted to 5120th in 2025, with a cumulative shift of about 426 places over the past two years, showing a slow downward trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5120th; the university's enrollment plan in Qinghai Science group: 50 in 2021, 51 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 53 in 2024, 52 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 53 (based on the 2026 enrollment plan document), a slight increase of 1 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 1.9%, leading to slightly intensified competition and pressure for ranking numbers to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked approximately 80th in 2026 (82nd in 2021→79th in 2025→80th in 2026), with rankings stable around 80th in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions; in 2023, the university attracted social attention due to an incident where a vice president publicly reported the president for material falsification, with negative evaluations; in 2025, the reputation remained somewhat negative, with hot majors' admission scores plummeting and some majors having no applicants; in 2026, the reputation continued to be somewhat negative, involving student academic misconduct incidents. On Douyin, the comprehensive popularity ranking is 77th, rated as "average," with low exposure on short video platforms. The overall somewhat negative reputation may have a certain inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A- or above discipline at the university; Mechanical Engineering, Instrument Science, Electrical Engineering, and other engineering fields are relatively strong, highly correlated with majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, and Instrumentation, providing positive attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have maintained high social popularity from 2024 to 2026 (highly recommended/recommended), aligning with the university's advantageous engineering directions; majors like Civil Engineering and Architecture, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials have significantly lower popularity. In 2025, Qinghai Province had approximately 30,457 Physics Category examinees, and in 2026, the total number of examinees is about 48,000 (estimated at about 30,672 Physics Category based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 63.9%), with a slight increase in examinee numbers, leading to slightly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slow downward trend in historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (1 person), a slight increase in examinee numbers, and the somewhat negative reputation, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 5120th, it is expected that competition will slightly intensify in 2026, with ranking numbers increasing slightly. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 5209th, with a range of 4709–5709th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4709–5709th, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Automation, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science and Technology, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Polymer Materials and Engineering, Applied Chemistry, Chemical Engineering and Technology, etc.) as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4709th), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>5500th), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety net majors.
